title: CareBundles Workbench
description: The CareBundles Workbench gives you a coverage matrix of qualified patient counts for each condition-specific care bundle across your connected data sources. Each cell shows how many patients in a given source meet the bundle's entry criteria. Bundles must be materialized before counts appear.
tips: Click 'Materialize all' to run qualification logic for every bundle × source combination at once.
Sources with fewer than 100,000 patients are excluded by default — toggle 'Show research-only sources' to include them.
Click any non-zero count cell to drill into that bundle's per-measure performance for that source.
A grey dash means the bundle has never been materialized for that source. A zero means the source was run but no patients qualified.
Each care bundle corresponds to a FHIR eCQM program (e.g. CMS349 for HIV screening). The bundle code is the CMS measure ID.
